obligations.rule: The input must be a valid fully qualified domain name (FQDN) according to the default options.
obligations.why: Baseline requirement from README behavior summary.

obligations.rule: The input must include a TLD when `require_tld` is true.
obligations.why: README specifies `require_tld` defaults to true and mandates a TLD.

obligations.rule: Underscores are disallowed unless `allow_underscores` is true.
Trailing dots are disallowed unless `allow_trailing_dot` is true.
Numeric TLDs are disallowed unless `allow_numeric_tld` is true.
Wildcards are disallowed unless `allow_wildcard` is true.
Domain parts must not exceed 63 characters unless `ignore_max_length` is true.

test_groups.title: Default behavior validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior of the validator with no options provided, ensuring baseline correctness.

test_groups.title: Underscore allowance
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when underscores are allowed in domain parts.

test_groups.title: Trailing dot allowance
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when trailing dots are allowed in domain names.

test_groups.title: Numeric TLD allowance
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when numeric TLDs are allowed.

test_groups.title: Wildcard allowance
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when wildcard domains are allowed.

test_groups.title: Ignore max length
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when domain parts exceeding 63 characters are allowed.

test_groups.title: Spaces in TLD with require_tld enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when spaces are present in the TLD and require_tld is enabled.

test_groups.title: Numeric TLD rejection with allow_numeric_tld disabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when numeric TLDs are rejected due to allow_numeric_tld being disabled.

test_groups.title: Domain parts starting or ending with hyphens
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when domain parts start or end with hyphens, which are explicitly disallowed.

test_groups.title: Full-width character rejection
test_groups.rationale: Tests the rejection of domain parts containing full-width characters, as explicitly disallowed in the source code.

test_groups.title: Spaces in domain parts
test_groups.rationale: Tests the rejection of domain parts containing spaces, which are explicitly disallowed in the source code.

test_groups.title: Wildcard stripping validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior of wildcard domains being stripped (`*.` prefix removed) before validation, ensuring correctness of the wildcard handling logic.

test_groups.title: Domain parts exceeding 63 characters
test_groups.rationale: Tests the rejection of domain parts exceeding 63 characters when ignore_max_length is false.

test_groups.title: Wildcard rejection when allow_wildcard is false
test_groups.rationale: Tests the rejection of domains starting with `*.` when allow_wildcard is false.

test_groups.title: Spaces in TLD with require_tld disabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the rejection of TLDs containing spaces when require_tld is false.

test_groups.title: Invalid characters in domain parts
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of domain parts containing invalid characters outside the allowed range defined by `/^[a-z_\u00a1-\uffff0-9-]+$/i`.

test_groups.title: Underscore rejection at start or end of domain parts
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of domain parts starting or ending with underscores when `allow_underscores` is false.

test_groups.title: Numeric TLD rejection with allow_numeric_tld disabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of numeric-only TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is disabled.
